meta.title: Thorque Software | Digital Infrastructure for Businesses
meta.description: We automate processes, integrate systems, and develop custom software for businesses and companies that need to scale their digital operations.

hero.title: We automate the digital infrastructure of your business
hero.subtitle: Complex integrations, intelligent bots, custom CRMs, and scalable APIs. We design systems that power your operation from day one.

problems.title: Challenges holding back growth
problems.subtitle: Companies face operational friction that prevents them from scaling. We identify the most critical pain points.

items.title: Manual processes
items.description: Repetitive tasks that consume hours of valuable work and generate costly human errors.

items.title: Leads without follow-up
items.description: Business opportunities lost due to lack of automation in the commercial pipeline.

items.title: Disconnected systems
items.description: Isolated tools that don't communicate with each other, creating information silos.

items.title: No automation
items.description: Critical operations that depend on manual intervention, limiting the ability to scale.

items.title: Low traceability
items.description: Lack of visibility into key metrics that hinder strategic decision-making.

items.title: Outdated technology
items.description: Legacy infrastructure that doesn't support current market requirements.

solutions.title: Technology designed for growing companies
solutions.subtitle: Each solution is designed to solve real problems and generate measurable impact on your operation.

items.title: Process automation
items.description: We eliminate repetitive tasks with intelligent workflows that reduce operating times by up to 80%.

items.title: CRM + channel integration
items.description: We connect WhatsApp, Instagram, email, and APIs into a unified ecosystem for your sales team.

items.title: Intelligent bots
items.description: AI agents for acquisition, pre-qualification, and 24/7 automated customer service.

items.title: Scalable architecture
items.description: Modular systems designed to grow with your business without rewriting code.

items.title: Strategic dashboards
items.description: Real-time control panels that transform data into actionable decisions.

items.title: APIs & microservices
items.description: Development of robust APIs and independent services that integrate with any existing system.

architecture.title: Enterprise-grade architecture
architecture.subtitle: Every project is built with engineering standards that guarantee performance, security, and scalability.

items.title: Robust backend
items.description: Server-side infrastructure with Node.js, Python, and high-availability databases.

items.title: Official APIs
items.description: Direct integration with WhatsApp Business, Meta, Google, and corporate provider APIs.

items.title: Advanced security
items.description: End-to-end encryption, multi-factor authentication, and international regulatory compliance.

items.title: Cloud infrastructure
items.description: Deployments on AWS, Vercel, and cloud services with high availability and auto-scaling.

items.title: Modular systems
items.description: Microservices architecture that allows scaling components independently.

items.title: Automated CI/CD
items.description: Continuous integration and deployment pipelines for fast and secure deliveries.

process.title: Consultative approach, concrete results
process.subtitle: We don don't just execute projects. We build strategic partnerships with a proven end-to-end process.

steps.title: Strategic diagnosis
steps.description: We analyze your operation, identify pain points, and define automation opportunities.

steps.title: Architecture design
steps.description: We define the optimal technical solution with diagrams, flows, and detailed specifications.

steps.title: Agile implementation
steps.description: Iterative development with weekly sprints, live demos, and continuous feedback.

steps.title: Continuous optimization
steps.description: Monitoring, metrics analysis, and constant improvements to maximize the ROI of your investment.

differentiator.title: We don't build generic software.
differentiator.highlight: We design digital infrastructure that scales with your business.

contact.title: Let's talk about your next project
contact.subtitle: Fill out the form and our team will contact you within the next 24 business hours.

form.name: Full name
form.success_message: Thanks for reaching out. We'll get back to you soon.

footer.description: Digital infrastructure for companies that need to scale.
footer.testimonial: Thorque transformed our entire digital operation. Response time dropped from 48h to under 2h.
